etymology.description: Depicts a stylized foot (้พฐ), originally a footprint pointing up
etymology.interpretation: ้พฐ(yรน, "stylized feet") presents a stylized representation of a foot, initially picturing a footprint directed upwards with three toes akin to simplified human hand representations. This visualization connects it to other ancient forms depicting extremities, with a particular parallel to the lower extremities depicted by characters like ๆญข(ๆญข) (zhว, "foot") as well as other related figures in the oracle script.
